message: bd-lff4p.2.17: add remote selection/search E2E scenarios

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "name": "remote_search_workflow",
+  "description": "Search workflow markers over WebSocket shell interactions",
+  "initial_cols": 100,
+  "initial_rows": 30,
+  "steps": [
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf 'SEARCH_SCENARIO_START\\nalpha\\nneedle one\\nbeta\\nneedle two\\nSEARCH_SCENARIO_END\\n'\n", "delay_ms": 200},
+    {"type": "drain"},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf 'alpha\\nneedle one\\nbeta\\nneedle two\\n' | grep -n 'needle'\n", "delay_ms": 150},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf 'search_target_01\\nsearch_target_02\\n' | grep -n 'search_target_02'\n", "delay_ms": 150},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "echo 'SEARCH_DONE'\n", "delay_ms": 100},
+    {"type": "drain"}
+  ],
+  "timeout_s": 20
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+{
+  "name": "remote_selection_copy",
+  "description": "Selection-plus-copy interaction markers over WebSocket",
+  "initial_cols": 100,
+  "initial_rows": 30,
+  "steps": [
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf 'SELECTION_COPY_START\\nalpha beta gamma\\ndelta epsilon zeta\\nSELECTION_COPY_END\\n'\n", "delay_ms": 200},
+    {"type": "drain"},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf '\\033]52;c;YWxwaGEgYmV0YSBnYW1tYQ==\\a'\n", "delay_ms": 120, "comment": "OSC52 clipboard payload for 'alpha beta gamma'"},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "printf 'COPY_PAYLOAD_B64:YWxwaGEgYmV0YSBnYW1tYQ==\\n'\n", "delay_ms": 120},
+    {"type": "send", "data": "echo 'SELECTION_COPY_DONE'\n", "delay_ms": 120},
+    {"type": "drain"}
+  ],
+  "timeout_s": 20
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# E2E: Remote search workflow markers over WebSocket (bd-lff4p.2.17)
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+LIB_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../lib"
+SCENARIOS_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../scenarios/remote"
+
+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/common.sh"
+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/logging.sh"
+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/remote.sh"
+
+export E2E_DETERMINISTIC="${E2E_DETERMINISTIC:-1}"
+export E2E_SEED="${E2E_SEED:-0}"
+
+REMOTE_PORT="${REMOTE_PORT:-9246}"
+REMOTE_LOG_DIR="${REMOTE_LOG_DIR:-$E2E_LOG_DIR/remote_search}"
+mkdir -p "$REMOTE_LOG_DIR"
+
+trap remote_cleanup EXIT
+
+echo "=== Remote Search Workflow E2E Test ==="
+
+remote_start --port "$REMOTE_PORT" --cols 100 --rows 30 --cmd /bin/sh
+remote_wait_ready
+echo "[OK] Bridge ready on port $REMOTE_PORT"
+
+SCENARIO="$SCENARIOS_DIR/search_workflow.json"
+JSONL_OUT="$REMOTE_LOG_DIR/search_workflow.jsonl"
+TRANSCRIPT_OUT="$REMOTE_LOG_DIR/search_workflow.transcript"
+
+print_repro() {
+    echo "Repro command:"
+    echo "  E2E_DETERMINISTIC=$E2E_DETERMINISTIC E2E_SEED=$E2E_SEED REMOTE_PORT=$REMOTE_PORT bash $SCRIPT_DIR/test_remote_search.sh"
+    echo "Artifacts:"
+    echo "  Scenario:   $SCENARIO"
+    echo "  JSONL:      $JSONL_OUT"
+    echo "  Transcript: $TRANSCRIPT_OUT"
+    if [[ -n "${REMOTE_TELEMETRY_FILE:-}" ]]; then
+        echo "  Bridge:     $REMOTE_TELEMETRY_FILE"
+    fi
+}
+
+RESULT="$(remote_run_scenario "$SCENARIO" \
+    --jsonl "$JSONL_OUT" \
+    --transcript "$TRANSCRIPT_OUT" \
+    --summary 2>&1)" || {
+    echo "[FAIL] Scenario execution failed"
+    echo "$RESULT"
+    print_repro
+    exit 1
+}
+
+OUTCOME="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("outcome", "unknown"))' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+FRAMES="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("frames", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+WS_IN="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("ws_in_bytes", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+WS_OUT="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("ws_out_bytes", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+
+if [[ "$OUTCOME" != "pass" ]]; then
+    echo "[FAIL] Remote search scenario outcome: $OUTCOME"
+    echo "$RESULT"
+    print_repro
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ "${FRAMES:-0}" -lt 1 ]]; then
+    echo "[FAIL] Expected at least one frame, got: ${FRAMES:-0}"
+    print_repro
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+assert_transcript_contains() {
+    local marker="$1"
+    if ! strings "$TRANSCRIPT_OUT" | grep -Fq "$marker"; then
+        echo "[FAIL] Transcript missing marker: $marker"
+        print_repro
+        exit 1
+    fi
+}
+
+assert_transcript_contains "SEARCH_SCENARIO_START"
+assert_transcript_contains "needle one"
+assert_transcript_contains "needle two"
+assert_transcript_contains "search_target_02"
+assert_transcript_contains "SEARCH_DONE"
+
+echo "[PASS] Remote search workflow markers validated"
+echo "  WS in: $WS_IN bytes | WS out: $WS_OUT bytes | Frames: $FRAMES"

@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# E2E: Remote selection+copy interaction markers over WebSocket (bd-lff4p.2.17)
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+LIB_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../lib"
+SCENARIOS_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/../scenarios/remote"

+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/common.sh"
+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/logging.sh"
+# shellcheck source=/dev/null
+source "$LIB_DIR/remote.sh"
+
+export E2E_DETERMINISTIC="${E2E_DETERMINISTIC:-1}"
+export E2E_SEED="${E2E_SEED:-0}"
+
+REMOTE_PORT="${REMOTE_PORT:-9245}"
+REMOTE_LOG_DIR="${REMOTE_LOG_DIR:-$E2E_LOG_DIR/remote_selection_copy}"

+    echo "  Transcript: $TRANSCRIPT_OUT"

+OUTCOME="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("outcome", "unknown"))' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+FRAMES="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("frames", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+WS_IN="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("ws_in_bytes", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+WS_OUT="$(echo "$RESULT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("ws_out_bytes", 0))' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")"
+
+if [[ "$OUTCOME" != "pass" ]]; then

+    echo "$RESULT"
+    print_repro
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+if [[ "${FRAMES:-0}" -lt 1 ]]; then
+    echo "[FAIL] Expected at least one frame, got: ${FRAMES:-0}"
+    print_repro
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+assert_transcript_contains() {
+    local marker="$1"
+    if ! strings "$TRANSCRIPT_OUT" | grep -Fq "$marker"; then
+        echo "[FAIL] Transcript missing marker: $marker"
+        print_repro
+        exit 1
+    fi
+}
+
+assert_transcript_contains "SELECTION_COPY_START"
+assert_transcript_contains "SELECTION_COPY_END"
+assert_transcript_contains "COPY_PAYLOAD_B64:YWxwaGEgYmV0YSBnYW1tYQ=="
+assert_transcript_contains "SELECTION_COPY_DONE"
+
+echo "[PASS] Remote selection+copy markers validated"
+echo "  WS in: $WS_IN bytes | WS out: $WS_OUT bytes | Frames: $FRAMES"
